summary: Iteration 45 - Comprehensive testing of theme compliance, Crew Assignments, Score-Based Coaching, Settings overhaul, and rubric expansion. All 13 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified in Dark theme.

issues: Console warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option> - hydration error warning (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: CrewAssignmentPage has a hydration warning due to <span> inside <option> elements - consider removing the span wrapper
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 45 passed all tests. Theme compliance verified across Settings, Dashboard, Crew Assignments, and Owner Review pages in Dark theme. All CSS variables properly applied. Crew Assignment CRUD fully functional including Pre-load week forecast (created 30 assignments). Score-Based Coaching widget visible on dashboard. PDF download button present in Settings. 33 rubrics across 7 divisions verified. 25 standards verified.
